title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: osinfo-db bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for osinfo-db is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The osinfo-db package contains a database that provides information about operating systems and hypervisor platforms to facilitate the automated configuration and provisioning of new virtual machines. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Add RHEL 9.5 and RHEL 9.6 to cockpit Operating system list (JIRA:RHEL-103999)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: [RFE] Add RHEL 9.5 and RHEL 9.6 to cockpit Operating system list

full_text:
An update for osinfo-db is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The osinfo-db package contains a database that provides information about operating systems and hypervisor platforms to facilitate the automated configuration and provisioning of new virtual machines. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Add RHEL 9.5 and RHEL 9.6 to cockpit Operating system list (JIRA:RHEL-103999)
